APPEARING FOR DEFENDANT SYLVESTER BURNLEY. PEGAH SHETABI, ESQ. APPEARING FOR DEFENDANTS UBER TECHNOLOGIES, INC. AND RASIER-CA, LLC. AFTER ARGUMENT, THE COURT DENIES DEFENDANT SYLVESTER BURNLEY'S MOTION TO CONTINUE TRIAL. THE TRIAL DATE OF 2/24/20 AT 9:30AM IN DEPT. 206 REMAINS. THE COURT WILL CONSIDER A FURTHER MOTION TO CONTINUE TRIAL IF SUPPORTED BY A LETTER FROM MEDIATOR ARNOLD LEVINSON. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: GARRETT L. WONG; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
